visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown oversized jacket over a black top and a grey pleated skirt, stands in the aisle of a warehouse-style store. She gestures towards large text overlays and a Costco logo that appears at the top of the frame. (2) She moves toward a metal shelving unit stocked with boxes of yellow-capped seasoning cans. She picks up a twin-pack of Daisho Salt and Pepper and displays it to the camera while speaking. (3) The camera zooms in to a price tag on the shelf which reads $159 for the seasoning set. Other shoppers with carts are visible moving through the wide aisle in the background under bright industrial lighting. (4) The woman points to a large stack of the same product, showing the high availability of the items. She continues to hold the product near her face, smiling and gesturing as she speaks directly to the lens.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 黑五好康. [Variety]: 黑五沒人要買. [Variety]: 曾經需要排隊. [Variety]: 明星商品. (2) [Subtitle]: 曾經紅極一時這大黑五最被冷落的商品來了. (3) [Subtitle]: 沒有半個人買真的沒什麼人在買. (4) [Subtitle]: 之前還限購. (5) [Subtitle]: 159元沒有特價. (6) [Subtitle]: 推薦各位不用搶的時候可以買它. (7) [Subtitle]: 這邊超級空曠的. (8) [Subtitle]: 159元有兩路. (9) [Subtitle]: 大容量400克的. (10) [Subtitle]: 拿來做料理超方便. (11) [Subtitle]: 像黑五它就是會被冷落在這邊.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character, 4 passers-by in the background shopping aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long straight dark hair, wearing a brown jacket, black choker, and a long grey pleated skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large warehouse-style retail interior with high concrete walls, industrial metal shelving, and various palletized products. Fluorescent lighting illuminates the wide aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks with high energy and a fast speech rate about shopping deals. An upbeat electronic pop background music track plays simultaneously with a prominent synthetic beat. (2) Faint rustling sounds are heard as an object is picked up. A brief male voice responds off-camera with a low-arousal, supportive tone. (3) The female narrator continues her description, emphasizing the price and volume of the seasoning. The background noise floor includes a subtle room tone of a large retail space. (4) The music remains continuous throughout the sequence, maintaining a positive and promotional atmosphere. The vocals are clearly enunciated with frequent rising intonation to maintain audience engagement.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and informative vlog, highlighting a specific seasoning product at Costco that was once a trend but is now readily available during the Black Friday period. It aims to inform viewers about current store conditions and product value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator specifically features the brand 'Daisho' salt and pepper, showing the price tag and recommending its purchase at a specific retail chain (Costco).

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a typical social-media vertical vlog format with heavy text overlays to grab attention. The contrast between 'previously popular' and 'currently ignored' is used as a narrative hook.
